zh.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde是Elizabeth Bunckom的女兒，於1583年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾姆 哈達哈姆。她於1612年與Edmund Tapp Jr.在英國賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1673年8月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德享年90歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德米爾福德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde是Elizabeth Bunckom的女儿，于1583年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾姆 哈達哈姆。她于1612年与Edmund Tapp Jr.在英国賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1673年8月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德享年90岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德米爾福德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Charde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern): habitational name from Chard or South Chard in Somerset, recorded in Domesday Book as Cerdren, possibly from Old English ceart ‘rough heathland’ + ærn ‘building, dwelling’. In some instances the surname may have arisen simply as a topographic name from ceart.
In some cases possibly also French: from a shortened form of the personal name Richardon, a pet form of Richard , or a habitational name from Chard in Creuse.

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

historicEvents.description: On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.
New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England

en.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde was born in 1583, in Much Hadham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Elizabeth Bunckom. She married Edmund Tapp Jr. in 1612, in Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 17 August 1673, in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 90, and was buried in Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde est née en 1583, à Much Hadham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille d’Elizabeth Bunckom. Elle a épousé Edmund Tapp Jr. en 1612, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 août 1673, à Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde è nata il nel 1583 nel Much Hadham, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Elizabeth Bunckom. Lei sposato Edmund Tapp Jr. nel 1612, nel Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 17 agosto 1673, nel Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Chardeは1583年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアムチ ハドハムでElizabeth Bunckomの娘として生まれた。1612年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでEdmund Tapp Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1673年8月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンミルフォードで90歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンミルフォードミルフォード セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde(은)는 1583년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 무치 하드함에서 Elizabeth Bunckom의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1612년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 Edmund Tapp Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1673년 8월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 미퍼드에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 미퍼드 미퍼드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde nasceu em 1583, em Much Hadham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Elizabeth Bunckom. Ela casou-se com Edmund Tapp Jr. em 1612, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1673, em Milford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde родилась в 1583 г. в местности муч хадхам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её мать звали Elizabeth Bunckom. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Tapp Jr. в 1612 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 17 августа 1673 г. в местности милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности милфорд кеметири, милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Anne Charde nació en 1583, en Much Hadham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Elizabeth Bunckom. Se casó con Edmund Tapp Jr. en 1612, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1673, en Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
